entities.description: A figure containing two bar charts comparing EM/Accuracy and F1-score across Single, Multi, and Global configurations for MMLongBench and Qasper datasets.
Evaluation metric represented by blue bars in the chart, standing for Exact Match or Accuracy.
Evaluation metric represented by red bars in the chart, representing the harmonic mean of precision and recall.
The Y-axis label indicating the numerical value being measured in both charts.
A configuration category on the X-axis representing a single-task or single-passage setting.
A configuration category on the X-axis representing a multi-task or multi-passage setting.
A configuration category on the X-axis representing a global or holistic setting.
The first dataset evaluated in the left chart, focusing on long-context benchmarks.
The second dataset evaluated in the right chart, likely referring to the Question Answering in Scientific Papers with Reasoning dataset.
